data.body:
Goal:
Replace the load-bearing mode: "scene" | "groom" enum in POST /api/plans with spec-aligned names. The Scene concept was removed by foolery-dd18, but "scene" survives as a valid API input that drives prompt branching in buildPrompt(), and fallback display strings still emit "Scene N" wave names and "Drafting N scenes..." progress messages.

Verification:
1. POST /api/plans no longer accepts mode: "scene" — the enum uses spec-native terminology.
2. grep -r "Scene N\|Drafting.*scenes\|mode.*scene" in plan-related modules returns zero hits.
3. Existing tests pass with the renamed mode values.
4. OpenAPI schema reflects the updated enum.

Constraints:
- If external callers depend on mode: "scene", add a one-release deprecation alias that maps to the new name and logs a warning.
- Update orchestration-plan-normalization.ts, orchestration-plan-helpers.ts, orchestration-plan-types.ts, and API schema files.
data.title: Rename mode: "scene" to spec-native terminology in execution-plan API
